summary: Post-security fix QA completed. All 9 backend tests passed. Backend APIs working correctly: ai-status returns expected structure, metrics endpoint protected with METRICS_TOKEN, login/register functional. CRITICAL: External URL (work-1-*.prod-runtime.all-hands.dev) returns 404 - Kubernetes ingress routing issue, not a code issue.

integration_issues.issue: External URL https://work-1-bvczgakgfqgwdffp.prod-runtime.all-hands.dev returns 404 for both frontend and /api routes. This is a Kubernetes ingress routing issue, not a code issue. Frontend .env correctly set to localhost:8001 for local development.

action_items: Investigate Kubernetes ingress routing - external URL returns 404 for all routes
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is correct - all security fixes verified working
Frontend .env set to localhost:8001 is correct for local development
External URL routing issue is infrastructure-level, not code-level
